items.name: Laser Hair Reduction
items.tagline: Long-lasting hair reduction for all skin tones.
items.description: Using the Motus AZ+ laser, Aura provides comfortable and effective hair reduction for all skin tones. Sessions are fast and most clients need 6 to 12 treatments for optimal results. Individual sessions or packages available.

items.name: Skin Revitalization
items.tagline: Laser facial for improved texture, tone, and radiance.
items.description: The Moveo SR treatment uses non-ablative laser technology to improve skin texture, reduce signs of aging, and increase radiance. Results include improved elasticity and overall skin rejuvenation.

items.name: Dark Spot Reduction
items.tagline: Target sun damage, age spots, and pigmentation.
items.description: The Moveo PL treatment targets melanin to reduce the appearance of sunspots, age spots, and post-inflammatory pigmentation. Results can often be seen after the first session.

items.name: Redness & Vein Reduction
items.tagline: Reduce facial redness, spider veins, and broken capillaries.
items.description: The Moveo VL treatment targets vascular concerns including diffuse redness, spider veins, and superficial facial veins. Most clients see improvement over 2 to 3 sessions.

items.name: Moveo GLO
items.tagline: 3-in-1 combination laser treatment for comprehensive results.
items.description: Moveo GLO combines pigmentation reduction, skin revitalization, and vascular treatment in one session. Ideal for clients looking for comprehensive skin improvement with fewer visits.

items.name: Skinwave Aqua Facial
items.tagline: Deep cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate in one session.
items.description: The Skinwave Aqua Facial cleanses, exfoliates, and hydrates while delivering antioxidant benefits and reducing inflammation. Suitable for all skin types including acne-prone and sensitive skin.
